PokerStars Hand #220001000001: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02 USD) - 2024/01/07 15:30:00 ET
Table 'Altair II' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: BTNPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 2: SBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 3: BBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 4: UTGPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 5: HJPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 6: Hero ($2.00 in chips)
SBPlayer: posts small blind $0.01
BBPlayer: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kd]
UTGPlayer: folds
HJPlayer: folds
Hero: raises $0.04 to $0.06
BTNPlayer: folds
SBPlayer: folds
BBPlayer: folds
Uncalled bet ($0.04) returned to Hero
Hero collected $0.05 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.05 | Rake $0.00
Seat 1: BTNPlayer (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: SBPlayer (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: BBPlayer (big blind) folded before Flop
